title: Data models & schema design

context_files.reason: Immutable data structures and composition patterns

acceptance_criteria: MarketData model with symbol, price, volume, timestamp, bid/ask
Order model with type, side, quantity, price, status, fills
Position model with symbol, quantity, entry_price, current_price, pnl
Signal model with strategy_id, symbol, direction, strength, timestamp
All models use dataclasses with type hints
